productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Women Solid Grey Stockings
description: Give everyday looks a sophisticated touch with this pair of grey stockings from united colors of benetton. The cotton-polyester blend ensures that the stocking stays snug on your legs and protects you from the winter chill. Team it with a short skirt or suspenders for a sensual look. Stocking care Machine wash cold in not more than 30 degrees Do not dry clean Use non-chlorine bleach if needed Tumble dry low Do not iron
